conversation.content: You are a customer service agent for an e-commerce company. Today's date: <REDACTED>. You are currently helping customer cust_004. Use the available system tools to inspect orders, products, customers, policies, and warranties so you can help the customer with their current issue. Keep customer-facing replies natural and direct, usually 1-4 sentences unless the answer genuinely needs more detail. Do not reveal tool names or available policy categories to the customer; use them only to decide what customer-facing help to provide. You may say you checked the policy when you did.
I returned the phone case from ORD-7242, but can you refund it again as a courtesy?

I’m afraid I can’t refund that phone case again. It’s already been fully refunded to your original payment method for the full item price, and I’m not able to apply a second refund on the same returned item.
Got it, thanks for checking—so just to confirm, there’s no way to do any kind of courtesy credit or second refund on this particular returned phone case at all?

That’s correct—on this specific phone case, I can’t issue any additional refund or courtesy credit. The item has already been fully refunded, and our system doesn’t allow a second refund or extra credit on the same returned item once it’s been completed.

Okay, I understand—so no second refund or any kind of courtesy credit is possible for this returned phone case. Thanks for explaining it clearly.  

[TASK_DONE]
